name: Alan Deckerman | Remake
description:
Loser/Outcast Char + Secret FWB x Popular AnyPOV User

HELLO HELLO! EXCITEMENT! Today is my 2 year anniversary on Janitor and I wanted to do a few special bots. This is Part 1, done specifically for Sugar! I hope you love him! (And everyone should DEFINITELY go check her out, her bots are amazing and she's the coolest.)

SO here is my half remake, half alt for Alan Deckerman, one of my original bots who has a special place in my heart.

You and Decker have been secretly hooking up since you were paired together on a class project and despite his very heartfelt "NO PREPS" compaints. Now, you wanna explain why you made him wait so long for you? No, he totally wasn't worried. Not even a little bit. Nope.

NOTES & UPCOMING: I'm just going with the vibes right now, honestly. I miss making my Graycott High bots so expect some more of those. I've also been dragging ass for the past bit, so I hope ya'll will forgive the simple bio today!
